description: The initial instruction screen appears, asking the user to share their screen.
frame_description: Dark screen with white text instructions for screen sharing.

description: The text on the instruction screen updates to 'Perfect!'.
The task description and scenario are displayed on the screen.
frame_description: Dark screen with detailed task instructions.

description: Final instructions are shown, informing the user that the prototype will open shortly.
frame_description: Dark screen with final instructions and a note about the website opening.

description: The browser navigates to a blank page as the session transitions.
frame_description: Browser window showing a blank page.

description: The browser navigates to the Figma prototype URL.
frame_description: Browser window showing the Figma loading screen.

description: The Figma prototype content finishes loading and becomes visible on the screen.
frame_description: Figma prototype 'Smart Filters Mobile App' is loaded, showing a list of opportunities.

description: Scrolling down through the list of available opportunities to explore the content.
Scrolling back up to the top of the opportunity list.
Scrolling down the opportunity list again, more slowly.
